name: Man on the Block
short_description: "Man on the Block" is a game where you control a man and jump down blocks that serve as scaffolding. Points are added each time you land on a block, so try to land on as many blocks as possible.
detailed_description:
"Man on the Block" is a game where you control a man and jump down blocks that serve as scaffolding. Points are added each time you land on a block, so try to land on as many blocks as possible.

Once a block leaves your feet, it disappears, so you can't return to the same block again.

You have to go around three stages filled with disappearing blocks.

How many points can you earn in 3 laps?

However, you can easily retry as many times as you like.

Aim to get the highest points by repeating the game over and over again.
